credit.description: A single collaborator credit: the DID that contributed and the capacity (`role`) it contributed in. Both required. `role` is an OPEN string (`knownValues`, NOT a closed enum) so unknown roles never break clients and new roles are additive forever — no NSID rev (Gallery Posts DD 29949954 Update 2026-07-04). Characters are credited by Index-side tags, NOT by this def — internal tag management makes character-crediting a cheap additive change later. Consent runs the moderation road (e621-style flag -> disavow/hide); credit rendering respects atproto blocks and the Index-side suppression path, never a schema mutation.

role.description: The capacity in which the subject contributed. OPEN set — the v1 coverage below is illustrative, not exhaustive; clients render unknown roles verbatim.

did.description: The credited collaborator's DID. Public and permanent once published — a deliberate cross-persona correlation surface, opt-out at compose time.
